raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1991 would prevent homeless individuals from being needlessly moved into new shelters every 30 days.",
    "The current practice of moving homeless individuals between rooms or removing them every four weeks disrupts families with young children enrolled in neighborhood schools.",
    "Many motels and hotels do not participate in shelter programs due to concerns about establishing landlord-tenant relationships.",
    "AB 1991 clarifies that motels and hotels can provide lodging to individuals in shelter programs for longer than 30 days without establishing a tenant-landlord relationship.",
    "The bill requires shelter programs to make reasonable efforts to provide exit plans for participants upon removal from motels and hotels.",
    "Participants in these programs often lack clear guidance, leading to potentially arbitrary removals."
  ]
}
```
